steps.t: Raith is near Crannog's ruling seat, west of the centre island of Aughaire. Feradakh is at the Búth Luikh, south-east of Crannog's ruling-seat. Fongha…
Crannog is at his ruling-seat, west of Aughaire's centre island. You have defeated the three warriors set before you by Crannog and should tell him no…
